problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
hypothesis: Combining Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
